message:
fix(fr-command): SCRIPT FLUSH / FUNCTION DUMP / FUNCTION LIST extra-args parity [bd-frankenredis-hpag]

Three small divergences vs vendored redis 7.2.4:

- SCRIPT FLUSH ASYNC SYNC (argc=4): upstream commands.def
  declares -2; the FLUSH-mode error 'SCRIPT FLUSH only support
  SYNC|ASYNC option' fires for any unrecognised tail. Replace
  the WrongSubcommandArity branch.

- FUNCTION DUMP extra (argc=3): upstream commands.def declares
  arity = 2; an extra arg trips 'wrong number of arguments for
  function|dump command' before functions.c::functionDumpCommand
  runs. Add the early WrongSubcommandArity gate.

- FUNCTION LIST extra1 extra2: upstream
  functions.c::functionListCommand emits 'ERR Unknown argument
  <token>' for any token outside LIBRARYNAME / WITHCODE. fr
  silently ignored unknown tokens. Tighten the parser to error
  on unknown tokens (and to require an arg after LIBRARYNAME).

Update the script_admin_subcommands_rejected_from_scripts_after_validation
test to pin the new SCRIPT FLUSH wording. Differential probe vs
vendored redis 7.2.4 byte-matches all three after fix.
